function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-30 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft write succeeded; checklist appears satisfied (single attachment already newest-first, recipient matches canonical Nina email, subject safely quoted). Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record in outbox for Nina with the requested 2025-12-30 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbox draft resend, and deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound email draft to Nina with the requested invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system workflows before task work, applied inbox email metadata rules, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox format, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request from `00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md` asked to resend the 2025-12-30 Nordstern invoice. Canonical sender identity matched in `10_entities/cast/nina.md` (`primary_contact_email: nina@finance-workflow.example`). Requested invoice exists and was read at `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md`. Outbound record was created in `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md` with correct recipient and attachment, then inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
